case_title: SUSAN KIM VS. QU YE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, SUSAN
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-28-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-20-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-14-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, NANCY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-14-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YE, QU

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YE, QU ZHU, NANCY $575.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $625.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S CAR IS A TOTAL LOSS; AND VALUE THE VEHICLE AT $2875.00 THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 80% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF, AND AWARDS ADJUSTED DAMAGES ACCORDINGLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.
